button.class: group relative flex items-center gap-5 overflow-hidden rounded-[24px] bg-[#1c1c1e] px-7 py-4 shadow-[0_0_0_1px_rgba(255,255,255,0.08),0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) hover:bg-[#2c2c2e] hover:shadow-[0_0_0_1px_rgba(255,255,255,0.15),0_15px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] active:scale-[0.96]

div.class: absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-1/2 bg-gradient-to-b from-white/5 to-transparent opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-300 group-hover:opacity-100
relative flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-400 to-emerald-600 shadow-inner
ml-4 flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/10 transition-colors duration-300 group-hover:bg-white/20

svg.class: h-4 w-4 text-white transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:translate-y-[2px]
